text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: C-City! I-I'm here t'wish you a happy birthday!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you remembered my birthday? Thanks,
Yukino.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Y-you betcha! But, um... I don't act'ally have your
present ready yet...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No biggie. Hearing you wish me a happy birthday
is good enough already.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Y'see, I couldn't find anyth'n glam'rous enough
that I thought you'd like...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
So I'm just gonna ask you instead. Lemme know
what y'want, and I'll go buy it, lickety-split!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Something I want, huh? I can really ask for
anything?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
A-ask for anyth'n you want! Snacks, makeup—you
name it!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Then, how about you give me a fun day out
shopping with my friend?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And like, wouldn't going together be way faster
than you worrying over what to get all by
yourself?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
S-somebody pinch me! I get t'go shopp'n with
City!
